welcome.preview: Hi {name}! Thank you for your enquiry. Our medical team will reach out shortly to schedule your free consultation. Reply STOP to opt out.

appointment_reminder.preview: Reminder: your {service} consultation is tomorrow at {time}. Please arrive 10 minutes early. Reply YES to confirm.

re_engagement.preview: Hi {name}! Your last treatment results are best maintained with a touch-up session. Book within 14 days — reply BOOK.

consent_request.preview: Please review and sign your treatment consent form before your appointment: {link}
